entity.summary: Major Iranian centralized cryptocurrency exchange founded in 2018. HEI records Nobitex as an active exchange with event-backed history, including a June 2025 security breach and U.S. sanctions announced in June 2026.
entity.notes: Added as a fresh-discovery event-backed record rather than from the verified-unadded 1000-row backlog. Nobitex remains active. Regulatory descriptions are attributed to the U.S. Treasury and reporting sources; the company has denied direct government ties and said misuse occurred without management approval or awareness.

events.title: Nobitex suffered major security breach
events.description: Nobitex suffered a major security incident in June 2025. Public reporting and blockchain analysis described more than $90 million in crypto assets being transferred to inaccessible addresses in an apparently politically motivated attack.
events.notes: The attack was claimed by Predatory Sparrow. Attribution beyond the group's own claim is recorded cautiously.

events.title: United States announced sanctions against Nobitex
events.description: The U.S. Treasury announced sanctions targeting Nobitex and other Iranian digital-asset exchanges. Reuters and AP reported the action and the Treasury's stated sanctions-evasion rationale.
events.notes: This event records the sanctions designation and attributed government claims. Nobitex denied direct government connections in statements reported by Reuters.

events.title: Nobitex verified as active exchange entity
events.description: Nobitex was verified as an active Iranian centralized exchange through its official website and independent reporting.
events.notes: Fresh-discovery record; no verified-unadded backlog row was consumed.

evidence.title: Israel-linked group hacks Iranian cryptocurrency exchange in $90m heist
evidence.notes: Report on the breach, the claimed attacker, and Elliptic's estimate of more than $90 million transferred.

evidence.title: Iranian Crypto Exchange Hacked, More Than $90 Million Taken
evidence.notes: Independent report on the Nobitex breach and blockchain-analysis findings.

evidence.title: US Treasury issues new Iran sanctions targeting crypto exchanges
evidence.notes: Reuters report listing Nobitex among the Iranian digital-asset exchanges sanctioned by the United States.

evidence.title: US sanctions Iran's largest crypto exchange over IRGC links
evidence.notes: Detailed Reuters report on the sanctions announcement, Treasury claims, and Nobitex's denials.

evidence.title: US sanctions Iran's largest digital asset exchange Nobitex and 3 others
evidence.notes: Independent AP report on the U.S. sanctions designation.

evidence.title: Nobitex official website
evidence.notes: Official website used to verify the active exchange identity.

evidence.title: One of Iran's most powerful families founded its largest crypto exchange
evidence.notes: Reuters investigation used for founding year, exchange scale, continued operation, and contextual background.
